items.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
items.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

items.title: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
